response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no reference lyrics provided as it is talking). 2. JSON Usage: Used manual transcription as the reference JSON did not contain lyrics (as this is a spoken MC announcement segment). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitle blocks to start exactly at the onset of spoken phrases and split logical clauses to match her energetic delivery and dramatic pauses.

subtitles.original: いいね！コメント元気だね。
subtitles.english: Nice! You're so energetic in the comments.

subtitles.original: 本日は風真いろは生誕ライブ2026『Wind Trails』にご来場くださいまして、誠に...
subtitles.english: Thank you very much indeed for coming to Kazama Iroha Birthday Live 2026 "Wind Trails" today...

subtitles.original: 開演に先立ちまして、皆様にお願いとご案内を申し上げます。
subtitles.english: Prior to the start of the performance, I would like to make some requests and announcements.

subtitles.original: 開演中、カメラやスマートフォンなどは、えー、電源切られると見れなくなって困るので、電源は切らず、
subtitles.english: During the show, if you turn off your cameras or smartphones, you won't be able to watch, so please don't turn them off.

subtitles.original: 写真撮影などね、大量にしていただき、当配信のハッシュタグ『#風真いろは生誕ライブ2026』で、SNSに大量に画像ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Instead, please take lots of screenshots and post them on SNS with the stream hashtag #KazamaIrohaBirthdayLive2026!

subtitles.original: 目指せ、Xトレンド1位！よろしくお願いいたします！
subtitles.english: Let's aim for the #1 trending topic on X! I appreciate your support!

subtitles.original: あ、あの、でもスマホね、いっぱい写真撮ったりすると充電なくなっちゃいそうなんで、スマホで見てる勢は充電しっかりしてくださいね！
subtitles.english: Oh, but if you take too many photos, your phone might run out of battery, so those watching on phones, make sure they're fully charged!

subtitles.original: はい、そしてその2！激しく頭を振る、えー、激しくペンライトを振る、などはですね、
subtitles.english: Alright, and part two! Shaking your head violently, or, ah, waving your penlight violently...

subtitles.original: あの、あなた様のご自宅を破壊する危険性がございますので。あの、破壊されてもですね、こちらは責任一切負えませんので、お気をつけください。ダメだよ、みんな！
subtitles.english: ...has the risk of destroying your home. And even if it gets destroyed, we can't take any responsibility, so please be careful. No doing that, everyone!

subtitles.original: あ、そしてあと、もう1個、その3！今からハヤシライスを準備しようとしてる奴は、間に合わないからやめな。
subtitles.english: Oh, and one more thing, part three! Anyone trying to make Hayashi rice right now, you won't make it in time, so don't do it.

subtitles.original: 絶対間に合わないから！
subtitles.english: You definitely won't make it in time!

subtitles.original: まあね、何か食べたり飲んだりしながら、ぜひね、ゆっくり楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Well, I hope you have a great, relaxing time while eating or drinking something!

subtitles.original: それでは、もうそろそろ始まるので、
subtitles.english: Well then, it's about to start very soon, so...

subtitles.original: 今しばらくお待ちください。最後まで見てねー！
subtitles.english: ...please wait just a little longer. Make sure to watch until the very end!
